items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Ta-da! Welcome to the world of <te href=800003>Second Coming of Solaris</te>!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Tethys generated everything here after scanning you. Pretty amazing, right? Of course, Encore helped too! See that huge cake over there? That's Encore's design!

options.text: Wait, why am I a Cube now?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Because I turned you into one! Miss Shorekeeper could only grant me a tiny bit of Tethys' computing power, so this <te href=800004>Cube</te> is the best I could manage for you.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Ah... I'm so dizzy! What's going on?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Look, it's an Abby Cube!

options.text: Abby Cube? Isn't it the real Abby?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Uh-uh. Only you and me are real here. The rest are replicas based on the scan results.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: I followed Miss Shorekeeper's instructions and made 12 different Cubes! They should all be here... Huh?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Where's the cake?
Ha, ha, ha! Don't bother looking for it!

options.text: Another Abby Cube? Did you make two of them, Encore?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Nope, only one.

items.speaker: Abby (Evil)
items.text: Ha, ha, ha! I ain't no ordinary Abby! I'm the purest, most perfect Abby!

items.speaker: Abbowser
items.text: Body of perfection, eyes gleaming with wisdom, and a smile bursting with health! Yes, that's me, Abbowser!

items.speaker: Abbowser
items.text: Aha, you have a good taste! In that case, I'll go easy on you later.

items.speaker: Abbowser
items.text: The audacity! You'll regret underestimating me!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Hello, Abbowser! Did you hide the <te href=800002>Anniversary Cake</te>?

items.speaker: Abbowser
items.text: Guess what? I ate it! Boo! This world is under my control now! Ha, ha, ha!

items.speaker: Abbowser
items.text: Looks like you haven't figured things out yet. Well, well, enjoy your blissful ignorance while you can, 'cause I'm cooking up something big!

dialog.stepLabel: Abbowser: "Ugh, you really ticked me off by taking Lady Primus, but sin..."

items.speaker: Abbowser
items.text: Ugh, you really ticked me off by taking Lady Primus, but since you also dealt with that pesky one trying to take my turf, I'll forgive you!

items.speaker: Abbowser
items.text: Ha, ha, ha, now Level 10 will be mine again soon!

items.speaker: Abbowser
items.text: Hmph, you better start worrying about yourself! As the Big Boss, I'm about to show you what I'm really made of!

items.speaker: Abbowser
items.text: I'm sending my top three elites to deal with you. Each one's got a special surprise for you. Muahaha!

items.speaker: Abbowser
items.text: Alright, I'm off. Come face me, mortal! Oh, no. Almost forgot to ask...

items.speaker: Abbowser
items.text: Are you having fun?

items.speaker: Abbowser
items.text: Hehe, great! I'll head back to my position and wait for you!

items.speaker: Abbowser
items.text: What? Just okay?! Just hold your horses. I've still got some more prep work to do!

items.speaker: Abbowser
items.text: N-not having fun???

items.speaker: Abbowser
items.text: J-just come back later. I need to recap!

items.speaker: Abbowser
items.text: Did you hear me? Come later... but not too late! Anyway, you have to come find me. I'll be waiting!
